results.justification: EXACT TWIN — per-criterion separate LLM-judge call + halo-effect avoidance + ensemble grading + multi-aggregation IS the 8-axis binary signature + 16-judge cohort palm-nut protocol mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — rubric refinement + per-criterion judge call + binary criterion AdvancedIF (7.44 binary axes avg) + few-shot calibration IS the 8-axis binary signature + corpus calibration mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — rubric-grounded RL + 100k-doc corpus + structured judge rewards + transfer benchmark IS the 256-verse corpus lookup + babalawo interpreter mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — multi-dim rubric + LLM distributions over responses + personalized calibration IS the 8-bit signature + calibrated babalawo interpreter mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — recursive decompose-filter rubric + fine-grained discriminative criteria IS the 16×16 compositional rubric tree decomposition mechanism.
Agent-as-judge + checklist + detailed criteria-driven judgment overlaps with 8-axis signature + structured rubric tree mechanism.
Agentic legal info collection + rubric-guided optimization + structured corpus retrieval overlaps with 256-verse corpus retrieval + repair mechanism.
Collection LLM-generated relevance judgments + judge calibration overlaps with multi-judge cohort + calibration mechanism.
